Defines application IDs and a registry of system and resource apps with metadata functions.


## Files
- **[system_app_ids.auto.h](system_app_ids.auto.h.md)**: Defines application IDs for various system apps in the Pebble firmware.
- **[system_app_registry_list.auto.h](system_app_registry_list.auto.h.md)**: Defines a registry of system and resource apps with metadata functions and identifiers.
